socketedItems.secDescrText: Place a Frost Shield that drains your energy shield for one second or until you run out, gaining stages while this drain occurs. 20% increased Effect of Cold Ailments
20% of Damage dealt to you or Allies in Area with Hits by Enemies in Area is taken from Frost Shield's Life before your Life or Energy Shield

You gain +0.4% to Spell Critical Strike Chance per Stage while in Area
Frost Shield has 1000 maximum Life per Stage
Maximum 4 Stages
Gains 1 Stage every 0.3 seconds while you are losing Energy Shield
You lose 800 Energy Shield per second
